allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in data.get\('tree',[]\) if 'block' in t['path'].lower\(\) or t['path'].startswith\('src/app/blocks'\) or t['path'].startswith\('src/content'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in data.get\('tree',[]\) if 'block' in t['path'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\(item, indent=2\)\) for item in data['items'] if item.get\('type'\) == 'registry:block']")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['path']\) for t in data.get\('tree',[]\) if t['path'].startswith\('src/app/\(main\)/view'\)]")
